blocks.body: Passive with modal verbs is formed by the formula modal + be + V3. Modal verbs (can, could, may, might, must, should, will, would) do not change, and the passive is added through be + V3.

{ "title": "9. Short summary", "items": [ "Passive formula with modals: modal + be + V3.", "Negation: modal + not + be + V3.", "Question: Modal + Subject + be + V3?", "Past Perfect forms: modal + have been + V3.", "can/could be done is a possibility.", "may/might be done is a possibility.", "must be done — necessity; mustn't be done is a prohibition.", "should be done is a recommendation.", "should have been done - criticism (should have been done, but not done).", "Modal verbs do not change by person and number!" ] }
